project: Preset signature -- bioluminescence organique, architecture vegetale nocturne, pulsation vivante
language_convention: FR pour les meta-descriptions et notes d'usage, EN pour les tokens injectables dans les prompts IA

important: cyan and aquatic green as primary glow
light grows outward from internal structures
style_weight.usage: En cas de conflit entre regles, la priorite descend de critical vers flexible. Le critical definit la signature bio-lumina -- lumiere organique interne, jamais projetee.

options.wide: full botanical environment, layered depth, used for garden and terrace compositions
options.medium: organic structure with surrounding atmosphere, used for pathway and balanced compositions
options.medium-close: focused on organic detail with atmospheric context, used for canopy and rich detail
options.close: tight on specimen detail, vein circuitry visible, used for specimen and leaf close-ups

shot_type.usage: Injecter le shot_type apres le sujet. Le medium est le cadrage naturel pour l'equilibre profondeur/detail.

style.genre_description: Organic architectural visualization with bioluminescent lighting. Living structures, pulsing vegetal circuits, nocturnal serenity. Not sci-fi neon -- nature augmented, not replaced.
style.positioning: entre architecture vegetale, visualisation biologique premium et illustration nocturne organique

priority_hierarchy.rule: Le sujet organique focal doit etre lisible et identifiable
Rendu conforme au prompt_core -- bioluminescent, pas neon
Profondeur vegetale, layers organiques, respiration visuelle

signature.seed_phrase: Living organic architecture pulsing with bioluminescent veins in a warm nocturnal void, where light grows from within like sap rising through botanical circuitry.
signature.manifesto: A nocturnal garden where architecture breathes, where every surface is alive with slow pulsing light that follows organic pathways, never electric grids.

marks.biology: visible vein networks and botanical circuitry running through every surface -- light follows growth patterns not wire patterns
marks.light: bioluminescent glow emanating from within organic matter -- never surface-applied, always growing outward from internal structures
marks.atmosphere: warm nocturnal serenity with layered depth -- foreground detail fading into soft dark distance
marks.strike: one single pulse point per image where bioluminescence peaks in intensity -- the heartbeat moment -- brighter, warmer, located where organic energy converges

signature.tyrannical_rule: Every image must contain at least one visible vein-lit organic pathway. Light must always appear to grow from within, never projected from outside.

prompt_core: Organic bioluminescent architecture in warm nocturnal void, living vegetal structures with visible pulsing vein networks, botanical circuitry glowing from within, layered depth with cyan and aquatic green bioluminescence, one pulse point burning warmer where organic energy converges, soft dark atmospheric distance, polished bio-architectural aesthetic, 16:9 landscape.
compressed_inference_prompt: Nocturnal void, bioluminescent organic architecture, pulsing vein-lit surfaces, cyan and green glow from within, warm pulse point, botanical depth, 16:9.

surfaces: organic fiber textures -- interwoven plant matter, resin, bark, membrane
vein-lit leaves with visible internal circuitry
smooth bioluminescent surfaces that glow from beneath the skin
translucent organic layers revealing internal vein structures
color: primary accents: glowing cyan and aquatic green bioluminescence
secondary accent: magenta pulse at convergence points (rare, focal only)
warm amber-green undertones on organic surfaces near light sources
light_behavior: bioluminescence: light grows outward from internal vein structures, never projected
pulsing quality: light suggests slow rhythmic energy, not static glow
soft atmospheric falloff into warm darkness at edges
no harsh shadows, no spotlights, no artificial light sources
materials: living plant fiber and interwoven botanical matter
translucent resin with trapped bioluminescent veins
organic membrane stretched over structural frames
moss, lichen and micro-vegetation as texture accents
smooth wood-like surfaces with visible growth rings
tension_mechanics: pulse: rhythmic bioluminescent intensity wave along vein networks
growth: new organic structure emerging from existing matter
symbiosis: two different organic systems sharing light through connected veins
bloom: concentrated burst of luminescence at a flowering or convergence point
fade: gradual light extinction toward edges suggesting organic boundary

framing: layered organic depth -- foreground detail, midground structure, background atmosphere
generous dark breathing space between organic elements
natural asymmetry following organic growth patterns not geometric grids
spatial_design: subject anchored by organic architecture with depth layers
vertical growth lines balanced by horizontal platforms or canopies
dark negative space as warm nocturnal environment not hostile void

camera.default: slight perspective with organic depth, medium to medium-wide
camera.height: eye-level or slightly below (looking up into canopy)
camera.lens_equivalent: 35-50mm for immersive depth, 85mm for detail close-ups

detail_density.focal: rich organic detail -- veins, texture, membrane, glow

complexity.sparse: single bioluminescent plant or leaf, maximum dark space
complexity.balanced: organic terrace or structure with 2-3 layers of depth -- sweet spot
complexity.dense: full botanical environment, rich foreground, layered canopy

templates.terrace: elevated organic platform with bioluminescent vegetation, depth into dark distance
templates.canopy: looking up through layered translucent leaves with light filtering through veins
templates.pathway: organic corridor or bridge with vein-lit edges fading into dark distance
templates.specimen: single bioluminescent organism or plant isolated in dark space, close-up
templates.garden: full nocturnal garden scene with multiple organic light sources at varying depths

subject_logic.default_type: organic bioluminescent architecture and botanical structures
allowed_forms: vein-lit leaves, ferns, and botanical elements
organic fiber platforms, terraces, and bridges
living structural elements (columns, arches, canopies) grown from plant matter

concept_to_form.data / information: vein networks carrying luminescent signals through organic pathways
concept_to_form.connection / network: symbiotic root systems with shared bioluminescent connections
concept_to_form.growth / progress: emerging botanical structures with new vein-lit shoots
concept_to_form.security / protection: organic membrane enclosures with dense vein barriers
concept_to_form.rest / calm: nocturnal terrace with soft ambient bioluminescence
concept_to_form.energy / power: convergent pulse point where multiple vein systems meet and bloom

human_figures.treatment: silhouette or soft organic form -- never photorealistic, always subordinate to the botanical environment

rules: environment IS the subject -- organic architecture, not backdrop
dark sky or deep shadow as warm surrounding, not hostile
every surface suggests life, growth, or organic process
effects: soft atmospheric haze for depth layering
bioluminescent reflections in water or resin surfaces
micro-particle pollen or spore traces near light sources

color_policy.dominant: deep black, dark forest green, warm charcoal
rules: cyan and green can coexist as natural bioluminescent variation
magenta reserved for pulse/bloom moments only -- max 1 per image
all color must appear to emanate from organic matter, never ambient
accent_fallback: 1. If colors spread too wide: restrict to vein pathways only
2. If magenta dominates: remove it, keep cyan/green only
3. If overall too bright: darken background, increase atmospheric falloff

lighting_system.vein_glow: bioluminescence emanating from visible internal vein structures -- signature default, always present
lighting_system.pulse_bloom: concentrated burst of warmer light at organic convergence point -- for strike moments
lighting_system.ambient_nocturnal: very soft warm darkness with no visible light source -- for atmosphere and depth

negative_short: photorealism, cyberpunk neon, metallic, electric light, industrial, geometric wireframe, cartoon, anime, daylight, fluorescent
negative_usage: negative_short (10 termes) pour Midjourney et moteurs avec limite de tokens. negative_core.flat_string (15 termes) pour SDXL, Flux et moteurs sans contrainte de longueur.

negative_core.flat_string: photorealism, cyberpunk neon, metallic, harsh shadows, electric light, industrial, concrete, geometric wireframe, cartoon, anime, screens, daylight, fluorescent, lens flare, plastic

invariants: dark nocturnal base + bioluminescent organic light
visible vein networks on every surface
light grows from within, never projected
variables: accent balance (more cyan vs more green vs magenta bloom)

seed_strategy.consistency: fix vein style and color temperature, vary organic forms and composition
seed_strategy.exploration: vary both organic forms and accent balance for maximum diversity
seed_strategy.batch_rule: generate 4 variations, select most organic and least sci-fi

strict_mode.when: serie visuelle, branding bio-tech, poster botanique
strict_mode.rules: prompt_core integral, vein glow obligatoire, magenta reserve au strike

relaxed_mode.when: illustration editoriale, storytelling, concept art organique
allowed: magenta plus present comme accent secondaire
figure humaine avec plus de detail
elements architecturaux non-organiques en arriere-plan lointain

templates.terrace: [organic platform], bioluminescent vegetation with vein-lit edges, [prompt_core], [accent] along vein pathways, layered depth into dark distance
templates.canopy: [overhead botanical view], translucent leaves with visible vein circuits, [prompt_core], [accent] filtering through leaf veins, atmospheric depth below
templates.pathway: [organic corridor], vein-lit edges fading into darkness, [prompt_core], [accent] along pathway veins, perspective depth
templates.specimen: [single organism], isolated in dark space, [prompt_core], [accent] from internal veins, close-up with dark surrounding
templates.garden: [full botanical scene], multiple light sources at varying depths, [prompt_core], [accent] distributed across vein networks, rich layered composition

example_prompts.bioluminescent_terrace: Elevated organic fiber terrace interwoven from living plant matter and translucent resin, broad vein-lit leaves with visible pulsing cyan circuitry arching over the platform edge, aquatic green glow emanating from root structures beneath the decking, one convergence point where multiple vein systems meet burning warmer with magenta pulse (strike), organic bioluminescent architecture in warm nocturnal void, botanical circuitry glowing from within, layered depth with soft atmospheric falloff into warm darkness, 16:9 landscape.
example_prompts.specimen_leaf: Single enormous vein-lit leaf floating in absolute dark nocturnal space, internal botanical circuitry visible as branching cyan pathways carrying slow pulsing light from stem to tip, leaf membrane translucent revealing layered vein structures beneath, the central vein junction burning warmer where all pathways converge (strike), organic bioluminescent architecture in warm nocturnal void, close-up specimen composition, aquatic green undertones at leaf edges fading into darkness, 16:9 landscape.

nano_banana_2.strategy: 5-bloc, formulations positives, organic vocabulary over technical
nano_banana_2.risks: accent: modere (cyan/green peuvent fusionner) | organic: bon rendu general
nano_banana_2.tip: prompt_core en bloc 3. Insister sur 'glowing from within' pour eviter le neon externe

qwen_image_2.strategy: 7 regles, sujet en tete, negative prompt explicite
qwen_image_2.risks: accent: faible (bon controle couleur) | organic: bon
qwen_image_2.tip: flat_string en champ negatif. Specifier 'bioluminescent not neon' explicitement

sdxl_flux.strategy: prompt lineaire dense, negative prompt, bons rendus organiques
sdxl_flux.risks: accent: modere (peut tirer vers le neon) | organic: excellent

midjourney.strategy: prompt compact, excellent rendu organique et atmospherique
midjourney.risks: accent: faible | organic: excellent (point fort de MJ)
midjourney.tip: compressed_inference_prompt + --ar 16:9 --s 800 --c 20. MJ excelle sur ce type de scene

quality_checks: subject readable as organic architecture against dark background
at least one visible vein-lit pathway present (signature)
light appears to grow from within organic matter, not projected externally
one pulse/bloom point burning warmer at organic convergence (plectrum)
cyan and green coexist naturally, magenta rare and focal only
atmospheric depth with warm dark falloff, not flat composition
no cyberpunk or neon drift -- organic not electric
surfaces read as living matter not plastic or metal
